---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for a future version
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem or gap you've encountered. e.g. "It's frustrating when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Which part of the system does this affect?**
- [ ] Desktop app — Student / Teacher registry
- [ ] Desktop app — Attendance module
- [ ] Desktop app — Assessment runner
- [ ] Desktop app — Question bank manager
- [ ] Desktop app — Reports / printing
- [ ] Desktop app — Cloud sync
- [ ] Desktop app — Licensing
- [ ] Owner dashboard (web app)
- [ ] Documentation

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches or workarounds you've already considered.

**Additional context**
Mockups, screenshots, or any other context that would help.
